name: Cross-Distribution Package Manager
description: Install system packages with automatic distribution detection and fallback package-name support (supports apt and apk)

apt.description: Space-separated list of packages for apt-based distros (Debian, Ubuntu). Use pkgA|pkgB to try fallback names.

apk.description: Space-separated list of packages for apk-based distros (Alpine). Use pkgA|pkgB to try fallback names.
